name: Symbotic Inc.
business: Symbotic Inc. develops, commercializes, and deploys robotic automation systems for warehousing, automating the processing of pallets, cases, and items. Its systems are used by large retailers and wholesale distributors, including Walmart and C&S Wholesale Grocers. The company also provides software maintenance, support, and operation services.

exposures.sentence: Our robotic based automation systems, which include hardware and essential software, move, store and sort cases and eaches in warehouses.
Our autonomous A.I.-powered mobile robots allow our systems to have superior flexibility, speed and inventory handling capabilities.
Our systems are enhanced by our A.I.-powered autonomous software that spans high-level planning and sequencing algorithms down to hardware control and decision-making.

Our large de-palletizing robotic cells use state-of-the-art vision technology and our proprietary end-of-arm tools to pick up entire layers of cases and transfer them to our singulating robots that deconstruct the pallet layer down to the case level.
On the way to the storage structure, each case proceeds through a short scan tunnel where our systems use vision technology and sensors to digitize the dimensions and attributes of each inbound case.

In January 2025, we acquired the Advanced Systems and Robotics (ASR) business from Walmart and signed a Master Automation Agreement that provides for the development, manufacture and installation of automated systems for online pickup and delivery at Walmart retail stores.
Our systems at distribution centers are the backbone of commerce because our optimized case handling capability benefits all nodes downstream in the supply chain.

catalysts.event: Install first prototypes of next-generation micro-fulfillment solution
catalysts.sentence: Our first prototypes of our next-generation micro-fulfillment solution are planned to be installed in calendar year 2026.

catalysts.event: Walmart pays $165 million on first anniversary of ASR acquisition
catalysts.sentence: Associated with this development program, Walmart will pay us a total of $520 million, including $230 million that was paid at the closing of acquisition of ASR, $165 million payable on the first anniversary of the acquisition and $125 million payable on the second anniversary of the acquisition.

catalysts.event: Begin implementation of all Walmart systems under A&R MAA
catalysts.sentence: The implementation of our systems began in 2021 and will continue based upon an agreed-upon timeline, subject to limited adjustment, with the implementation of all systems to begin by the end of 2029.

tamClaims.claim: $144 billion initial addressable market for case-based system in the U.S. over 15-25 years
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the size of our initial addressable market for our case-based system to be $144 billion based on the number of warehouses in each of those verticals, our estimates of the percent of warehouses in each vertical that are addressable, and the expected average price of our systems and associated recurring software revenue over the next 15 to 25 years.

tamClaims.claim: $126 billion additional market opportunity from secondary verticals over 15 years
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that there is an additional $126 billion in market opportunity from our secondary verticals, which are non-food consumer packaged goods, home improvement, auto parts, third-party logistics, and refrigerated and frozen foods over the next 15 years.

tamClaims.claim: $322 billion total U.S. market opportunity over 15 years
tamClaims.sentence: we define our total addressable market as our total U.S. market opportunity of $322 billion plus our market opportunity in Canada, Germany, Italy, United Kingdom and France, which we estimate to be an additional $111 billion over the next 15 years.

tamClaims.claim: $433 billion total addressable market (U.S. plus select international) over 15 years
tamClaims.sentence: This implies a total addressable market of $433 billion over the next 15 years.

tamClaims.claim: $305 billion addressable market in the U.S. for micro-fulfillment solution
tamClaims.sentence: We have identified an additional $305 billion addressable market in the United States for our micro-fulfillment solution.
